title: Italian-Style Lamb Kebabs
description: A classic Italian-inspired dish featuring tender lamb kebabs, marinated in a blend of herbs and spices. Perfect for a warm summer evening.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and toss to coat.
4. Thread the lamb cubes onto the kebabs, leaving a small space between each cube.
5. Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
7. Transfer the kebabs to a plate and sprinkle with parsley.
